summary: Completed testing of Live Satellite Feed feature for CSDROP Portal (Iteration 11). All 15 backend tests passed. All frontend features working correctly. Live feed status endpoint returns availability and bot_running state. Live feed image endpoint serves JPEG with no-cache headers when file exists, returns 404 when missing. Frontend shows 'Live Satellite Feed' panel in Sovereign Bot tab with placeholder when bot is not running.
passed_tests: GET /api/csdrop/live-feed requires authentication (401)
GET /api/csdrop/live-feed rejects non-CSDROP users (403)
GET /api/csdrop/live-feed returns availability, bot_running, last_updated
GET /api/csdrop/live-feed shows available=true when file exists
GET /api/csdrop/live-feed/image has NO auth guard (for usage)
GET /api/csdrop/live-feed/image returns JPEG with content-type image/jpeg
GET /api/csdrop/live-feed/image has no-cache headers (Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache)
GET /api/csdrop/live-feed/image returns 404 when screenshot file doesn't exist
sovereign.py defines SCREENSHOT_PATH constant for live_stream.jpg
sovereign.py defines _capture_feed async function
sovereign.py uses stealth_async (not Stealth class)
sovereign.py calls _capture_feed at 5+ key action points
CSDROP dashboard endpoint still works
CSDROP health endpoint still works
CSDROP code execution still works
Frontend: CSDROP Dashboard loads correctly
Frontend: Live Satellite Feed panel visible in Sovereign Bot tab
Frontend: Placeholder text 'Feed activates when the bot is running' shown when bot not running
Frontend: Satellite icon and 'LIVE SATELLITE FEED' title visible
Frontend: Code Runner execution still works
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live Satellite Feed feature fully functional. Status endpoint at GET /api/csdrop/live-feed requires CSDROP auth and returns {available, bot_running, last_updated}. Image endpoint at GET /api/csdrop/live-feed/image has NO auth (for ) and returns JPEG with no-cache headers. Frontend shows Live Satellite Feed panel in Sovereign Bot tab with placeholder when bot not running. sovereign.py uses stealth_async and calls _capture_feed at key action points. Test placeholder image at /app/backend/static/live_stream.jpg.
